The '''''Cathleen''''' was a [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser|MC80 ''Liberty'' type]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
Some time before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the ''Cathleen'' awaited the return of battle-weary [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue]] and [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold]] squadrons after a successful attack on [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] shipping in [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. An Imperial [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]], ''[[Terminator]]'', arrived and launched [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bombers]] to destroy the vulnerable Rebel ships. Two [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and two [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] held off the Imperial fighters while ''Cathleen'' recovered the other Rebel ships and escaped. This mission was later recreated as a simulation for training new pilots.

Soon after the Battle of Yavin, the ''Cathleen'' drove away the Imperial Nebulon-B frigate [[Sentinel (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Sentinel'']] during an assault in [[Hollan sector/Legends|Hollan D1 sector]]. Later, she received captured [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|''Alpha''-class assault gunboats]] during [[Operation Ram's Head]]. Later, the ''Cathleen'' was the last ship to depart to [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] and the Imperial Nebulon-B frigate [[Dragon (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Dragon'']] attempted to stop it. When combined fleet attacks by the ''Cathleen'' and assistance by [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] destroyed the frigate, it was attacked by [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] [[Fang (corvette group)|''Fang'']], a squadron of [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|stormtrooper transports]] and finally the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Maximum]]''. However, the ''Cathleen'' was able to escape to hyperspace without witness.
